---
title: "Population"
format: html
---

```{r}
# =====================================================
# Table 1 – Population density
# =====================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)

# -----------------------------------------------------
# Load data
# -----------------------------------------------------

density_raw <- read_excel(
  here("data", "poblaciones.xlsx")
) %>%
  clean_names()

# -----------------------------------------------------
# Prepare data
# -----------------------------------------------------

density_tbl <- density_raw %>%
  mutate(
    area_km2 = poblacion / densidad_reportada,

    city = case_when(
      comuna == "antofagasta" ~ "Antofagasta",

      comuna %in% c(
        "la serena",
        "coquimbo"
      ) ~ "La Serena",

      comuna %in% c(
        "valparaiso",
        "viña del mar",
        "quilpue",
        "villa alemana"
      ) ~ "Valparaíso",

      comuna %in% c(
        "santiago (provincia)",
        "colina",
        "lampa",
        "padre hurtado",
        "peñaflor",
        "pirque",
        "puente alto",
        "san bernardo"
      ) ~ "Santiago",

      comuna %in% c(
        "concepcion",
        "talcahuano",
        "hualpen",
        "penco",
        "coronel",
        "san pedro de la paz"
      ) ~ "Concepción",

      comuna %in% c(
        "puerto montt",
        "puerto varas"
      ) ~ "Puerto Montt",

      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# -----------------------------------------------------
# Aggregate by city
# -----------------------------------------------------

city_density <- density_tbl %>%
  group_by(city) %>%
  summarise(
    population = sum(poblacion, na.rm = TRUE),
    area_km2 = sum(area_km2, na.rm = TRUE),
    population_density = population / area_km2,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    factor(
      city,
      levels = c(
        "Antofagasta",
        "La Serena",
        "Valparaíso",
        "Santiago",
        "Concepción",
        "Puerto Montt"
      )
    )
  )

city_density
# Population density was calculated using total population and total municipal area of the communes composing each conurbation.
```


```{r}
library(sf)
library(here)

ciudades <- st_read(
  here("data", "Mapa_Ciudades_2017", "Ciudades_2017.shp")
)

names(ciudades)

nrow(ciudades)
unique(ciudades$URBANO)
```

```{r}
# =====================================================
# Prepare urban polygons for climate extraction
# =====================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

# Si todavía no lo cargaste:
# ciudades <- st_read(
#   here("data", "Mapa_Ciudades_2017", "Ciudades_2017.shp")
# )

# -----------------------------------------------------
# 1. Assign urban polygons to study cities
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_study <- ciudades %>%
  mutate(
    CITY = case_when(
      NOM_COMUNA == "ANTOFAGASTA" ~ "Antofagasta",

      NOM_COMUNA %in% c(
        "LA SERENA",
        "COQUIMBO"
      ) ~ "La Serena",

      NOM_COMUNA %in% c(
        "VALPARAÍSO",
        "VIÑA DEL MAR",
        "QUILPUÉ",
        "VILLA ALEMANA"
      ) ~ "Valparaíso",

      NOM_COMUNA %in% c(
        "CERRILLOS", "CERRO NAVIA", "CONCHALÍ", "EL BOSQUE",
        "ESTACIÓN CENTRAL", "HUECHURABA", "INDEPENDENCIA",
        "LA CISTERNA", "LA FLORIDA", "LA GRANJA", "LA PINTANA",
        "LA REINA", "LAS CONDES", "LO BARNECHEA", "LO ESPEJO",
        "LO PRADO", "MACUL", "MAIPÚ", "ÑUÑOA",
        "PEDRO AGUIRRE CERDA", "PEÑALOLÉN", "PROVIDENCIA",
        "PUDAHUEL", "QULICURA", "QUINTA NORMAL", "RECOLETA",
        "RENCA", "SAN JOAQUÍN", "SAN MIGUEL", "SAN RAMÓN",
        "SANTIAGO", "VITACURA",
        "COLINA", "LAMPA", "PADRE HURTADO", "PEÑAFLOR",
        "PIRQUE", "PUENTE ALTO", "SAN BERNARDO"
      ) ~ "Santiago",

      NOM_COMUNA %in% c(
        "CONCEPCIÓN",
        "TALCAHUANO",
        "HUALPÉN",
        "PENCO",
        "CORONEL",
        "SAN PEDRO DE LA PAZ"
      ) ~ "Concepción",

      NOM_COMUNA %in% c(
        "PUERTO MONTT",
        "PUERTO VARAS"
      ) ~ "Puerto Montt",

      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CITY))

# -----------------------------------------------------
# 2. Check selected polygons
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_study %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(CITY, sort = FALSE) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

ciudades_study %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(CITY, NOM_COMUNA, URBANO, TIPO, CATEGORIA, TOT_PERSON) %>%
  arrange(CITY, NOM_COMUNA) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

# -----------------------------------------------------
# 3. Dissolve polygons into six study cities
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_ugs <- ciudades_study %>%
  group_by(CITY) %>%
  summarise(
    population_urban_2017 = sum(TOT_PERSON, na.rm = TRUE),
    urban_area_m2 = sum(as.numeric(st_area(geometry)), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    urban_area_km2 = urban_area_m2 / 1e6,
    urban_density_km2 = population_urban_2017 / urban_area_km2
  )

# -----------------------------------------------------
# 4. Final check
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_ugs %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  arrange(factor(
    CITY,
    levels = c(
      "Antofagasta",
      "La Serena",
      "Valparaíso",
      "Santiago",
      "Concepción",
      "Puerto Montt"
    )
  ))
```



```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# cargar 12 meses de temperatura
tavg_files <- list.files(
  here("data", "worldclim", "tavg"),
  pattern = "\\.tif$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

tavg <- rast(tavg_files)

# promedio anual
tavg_annual <- mean(tavg, na.rm = TRUE)

# revisar
tavg_annual
plot(tavg_annual)
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------
# Precipitation annual raster
# -----------------------------------------------------

prec_files <- list.files(
  here("data", "worldclim", "prec"),
  pattern = "\\.tif$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

prec_files
length(prec_files)

prec <- rast(prec_files)

# precipitación anual total
prec_annual <- sum(prec, na.rm = TRUE)

plot(prec_annual)
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------
# Extract precipitation by city
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_ugs_wgs84 <- st_transform(
  ciudades_ugs,
  crs(prec_annual)
)

prec_city <- terra::extract(
  prec_annual,
  vect(ciudades_ugs_wgs84),
  fun = mean,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

prec_city
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------
# Extract temperature by city
# -----------------------------------------------------

ciudades_ugs_wgs84 <- st_transform(
  ciudades_ugs,
  crs(tavg_annual)
)

temp_city <- terra::extract(
  tavg_annual,
  vect(ciudades_ugs_wgs84),
  fun = mean,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

temp_city
```



```{r}
climate_city <- ciudades_ugs %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(CITY) %>%
  bind_cols(
    mean_temperature = temp_city[, 2],
    annual_precipitation = prec_city[, 2]
  )

climate_city
```



```{r}
global(prec_annual, range, na.rm = TRUE)
global(tavg_annual, range, na.rm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
summary(prec_city[,2])
```
